Opening Hook (0:00-0:10)

"Don't make this $400 mistake at the department store... The saleswoman will convince you that more expensive means better results. But when your skin's structure has collapsed, price doesn't matter - THIS is much more important."



Problem + Authority (0:10-0:30)

"I'm Dr. Blane Schilling, and in my 30 years as an anti-aging physician, I've seen thousands of women waste fortunes on luxury eye creams that can't fix what's actually broken. Whether you spend $50 or $500, if your skin's foundation has collapsed, surface treatments won't work."



Unique Mechanism (0:30-0:55)

"See, every sign of eye aging - wrinkles, dark circles, puffiness - stems from Collagen Architecture Breakdown. Think of it like a woven fabric where the threads have become loose and tangled. Those expensive creams try to fix broken fabric by adding more on top, but they can't rebuild the collapsed foundation underneath.

But I've discovered how to signal your skin to reorganize this structure from within. In clinical studies, we're seeing up to 39% wrinkle reduction in just 4 weeks by targeting the real cause."



Call to Action (0:55-1:30)

"I've put together a free presentation revealing exactly how this structural renewal works and why price has nothing to do with real results. Don't waste another dollar on department store promises. Click below to discover what actually reverses eye aging at its source. This breakthrough changes everything, and there's no telling how long this presentation will stay available. Click now."
